calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-16-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Feb-23-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Tito Torres, Esq. for Plaintiff: San Francisco Housing Authority.
Order waiving live testimony at Default Prove-Up Hearing is in the court's file.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Diondre Young for injunctive relief to abate a public nuisance caused by the conduct and activities of the defendant (see details of the judgment in scanned doc).
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-05-2010 Set For Order To Show Cause On Mar-29-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
